attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT users.id, users.email, users.hashed_password, users.display_name, users.created_at, users.is_active 
FROM users 
WHERE users.id = $1::UUID /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-04e81c25fd3e96751f10a5d90a6b0cd6-8f5bde7ebcc0d8d7-01'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT tasks.id, tasks.project_id, tasks.title, tasks.description, tasks.status, tasks.priority, tasks.assignee_id, tasks.due_date, tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at 
FROM tasks 
WHERE tasks.project_id = $1::UUID ORDER BY tasks.created_at DESC /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-04e81c25fd3e96751f10a5d90a6b0cd6-33f64d60bdee76c7-01'*/

attributes.db.name: taskflow
attributes.db.statement:
SELECT comments.task_id AS comments_task_id, comments.id AS comments_id, comments.author_id AS comments_author_id, comments.content AS comments_content, comments.created_at AS comments_created_at 
FROM comments 
WHERE comments.task_id IN ($1::UUID) ORDER BY comments.created_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-04e81c25fd3e96751f10a5d90a6b0cd6-d20f2c38309cc011-01'*/

attributes.db.statement: INSERT INTO tasks (id, project_id, title, description, status, priority, assignee_id, due_date) VALUES ($1::UUID, $2::UUID, $3::VARCHAR, $4::VARCHAR, $5::task_status, $6::INTEGER, $7::UUID, $8::TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE) RETURNING tasks.created_at, tasks.updated_at /*db_driver='asyncpg',db_framework='sqlalchemy%%3A2.0.51',traceparent='00-f4401acd4b6b42cdbc6d57bd8ebc68ac-e1ddab421dacccf7-03'*/
